# opnsense_quagga_prefix_list (Resource)

Manages a BGP prefix list entry on OPNsense via the FRR/Quagga plugin. Requires `os-frr`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "opnsense_quagga_prefix_list" "allow_k8s" {
  name     = "allow-k8s-pods"
  sequence = 10
  action   = "permit"
  network  = "10.244.0.0/16 le 32"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) Action: `permit` or `deny`.
- `name` (String) Prefix list name.
- `network` (String) Network prefix (e.g., `10.0.0.0/8 le 24`).
- `sequence` (Number) Sequence number.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this prefix list entry is enabled.
- `version` (String) IP version: `IPv4` or `IPv6`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.

## Import

```shell
terraform import opnsense_quagga_prefix_list.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
